message:
feat(mobile): enhance mobile ux with readable sequence grid and responsive layouts

- Renderer: Enforce text rendering on mobile (min 10px cells) for readability.
- Renderer: Increased mobile cell size thresholds in getResponsiveCellSize.
- Layout: Added mobile-landscape.css for side-by-side view (Sequence + 3D).
- Layout: Optimized portrait mode to maximize SequenceView height ('Longer view').
